name: Randuin's Omen

passives.name: Resilience
passives.effects: Reduces incoming damage from {{tip|critical strike|critical strikes}} by 30%.

active.name: Humility
active.effects: Unleash a shockwave around you that {{tip|slow|slows}} nearby enemies by 70% for 2 seconds.

effects_structured.raw: Reduces incoming damage from {{tip critical strike critical strikes}} by 30%.
Unleash a shockwave around you that {{tip slow slows}} nearby enemies by 70% for 2 seconds.

simpleDescription: Greatly increases defenses, activate to slow nearby enemies

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Resilience is a persistent incoming critical-strike damage reduction on the holder.
Execution model: Humility is a targeted self-centered active that emits a visible 500-unit shockwave, applying a 70% slow to nearby enemies for 2 seconds.
Timing note: Humility has no projectile travel; nearby enemies are slowed immediately on activation and the active cooldown is 90 seconds.

Wave 125 (2026-02-25): Backfilled explicit active-cast execution fields (`effect_hitbox_radius`, `cast_windup_seconds`) from page-verified shockwave geometry and immediate-resolution timing semantics.
